inputs.label: Volume of Wine 1
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the first wine, typically the one with higher ABV

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of the first wine, typically the one with higher ABV
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle daha yüksek alkol oranına sahip olan ilk şarabın hacmi
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen des ersten Weins, typischerweise der mit höherem Alkoholgehalt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume du premier vin, généralement celui avec le titre alcoométrique le plus élevé
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen del primer vino, típicamente el de mayor ABV
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم النبيذ الأول، عادةً ما يكون ذو نسبة كحول أعلى

inputs.label: ABV of Wine 1
inputs.businessContext: Alcohol by volume percentage of the first wine

businessContext_i18n.en: Alcohol by volume percentage of the first wine
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'alcool par volume du premier vin
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de alcohol por volumen del primer vino
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الكحول من حيث الحجم في النبيذ الأول

inputs.label: ABV of Wine 2
inputs.businessContext: Alcohol by volume percentage of the second wine, lower than target ABV

businessContext_i18n.en: Alcohol by volume percentage of the second wine, lower than target ABV
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci şarabın hacimce alkol yüzdesi, hedef ABV'den düşük
businessContext_i18n.de: Alkoholgehalt in Volumenprozent des zweiten Weins, niedriger als Ziel-ABV
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'alcool par volume du second vin, inférieur à l'ABV cible
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de alcohol por volumen del segundo vino, inferior al ABV objetivo
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الكحول من حيث الحجم في النبيذ الثاني، أقل من نسبة الكحول المستهدفة

inputs.label: Target ABV
inputs.businessContext: Desired alcohol by volume percentage of the final blend

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired alcohol by volume percentage of the final blend
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai karışımın istenen hacimce alkol yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschter Alkoholgehalt in Volumenprozent der endgültigen Mischung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'alcool par volume souhaité du mélange final
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de alcohol por volumen deseado de la mezcla final
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الكحول المطلوبة من حيث الحجم في المزيج النهائي

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
